commit 4bd0a01a744514a729c597a3892116b95d015056
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 17 18:05:08 2026 +0500

    perf: optimize tile generation for 4M vector objects
    
    Add zoom-based type filtering to MVT tile query to skip invisible
    objects at low zoom levels (buildings excluded below zoom 13, reducing
    processed rows from 4M to 93K at continental scale).
    
    Add geometry simplification with ST_SimplifyPreserveTopology at low
    zooms to reduce vertex processing by up to 99%.
    
    Add SRID 3857 functional GIST index to eliminate per-row coordinate
    transformation during tile spatial intersection checks.
    
    Configure frontend VectorTileLayer with maxNativeZoom, updateWhenZooming,
    updateWhenIdle, and keepBuffer to reduce tile requests during interaction.
    
    Fix tile cache invalidation: tiles are now cleared on object
    create/update/delete instead of remaining stale for 24 hours.
    
    Remove incorrect Content-Encoding: gzip header from tile responses.
    
    Add Nginx proxy cache for tiles, Redis maxmemory limit, and PostgreSQL
    memory tuning for shared_buffers and work_mem.

commit 2905a94f00c29c534ac5f30900302ede75f67e70
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 17 11:49:07 2026 +0500

    feat: implement viewer page, admin panel, complaints system, and auth improvements
    
    Add read-only map viewer (/map) for regular users with object selection,
    history browsing, type filtering, search area (polygon/rectangle via Geoman),
    complaint submission, and coordinate display.
    
    Add admin panel with user management, complaint review with status workflow
    (pending, in_review, resolved, dismissed), dashboard statistics, and
    navigation to complained objects on the map.
    
    Extend auth service with OAuth support, email verification, and user
    profile management. Add complaint endpoints to map service with
    repository and caching layers.
    
    Improve VectorTileLayer click handling with feature property forwarding
    and cursor feedback on hoverable objects. Fix editor highlight and
    Geoman style conflicts.

commit a0b2b540e9a9a4dcc058a5b9aab7ca86c88d9d24
Author: hsibAD <abish.diana@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu Mar 12 20:21:34 2026 +0500

    fix: finalize system stability, resolve CORS conflicts, and optimize backend performance
    
    - Resolved 'Multiple CORS header' errors by centralizing header management in the Nginx API Gateway and removing redundant middleware from Go services.
    - Fixed backend 500 errors in history tracking by implementing safe pointer-based scanning for NULL snapshots in the database.
    - Eliminated Leaflet 'wrong listener type' warnings by stabilizing event handler references via useCallback and ensuring proper cleanup in useEffect.
    - Optimized database query performance by applying a LIMIT 1000 constraint to prevent frontend congestion when rendering large object sets.
    - Suppressed deprecated THREE.Clock warnings from external dependencies globally.
    - Ensured reliable state synchronization after object rollback without requiring a full page refresh.

commit 72fec29f61e569a0f637bee6ced1294328bd11da
Author: hsibAD <abish.diana@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu Mar 12 12:18:05 2026 +0500

    fix(frontend): resolve race conditions in feature history synchronization
    
    - Refactored LayersPanel.tsx to utilize useEditorStore.getState() for retrieving feature data within effects and callbacks.
    - Removed features from the dependency arrays of the history-fetching useEffect and the confirmRollback callback.
    - Mitigated race conditions where concurrent feature updates triggered redundant history requests, preventing stale data from overwriting recent state changes.
    - Improved data consistency by ensuring history operations always reference the most recent store snapshot.

    - Verified MVT + Redis architecture integrity across the system.

commit 9a426630ba5c6aafe5e66cd77ea71e29c4d29b18
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Sat Feb 28 16:59:41 2026 +0500

    feat: Implement high-performance MVT + Redis architecture with Map Baker
    
    - Implemented Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT) generation using PostGIS ST_AsMVT.
    - Integrated Redis for binary tile caching ('baking') with 24h TTL.
    - Updated Map Service to serve baked tiles via /api/map/tiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf.
    - Added 'Leaflet.VectorGrid' to frontend for seamless background rendering of 3.8M objects.
    - Enhanced JWT middleware to support token authentication via query parameters (required for tile requests).
    - Created 'bake_map.sh' script for automated cache warmup (whole country to zoom 11, major cities to zoom 16).
    - Optimized Docker build process for frontend after adding new vector grid dependencies.

commit 41bb6d57f0c7287e5e01b36aabd05c4a07c7145a
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Feb 27 23:33:51 2026 +0500

    feat: Enhance Map UI with modern globe animations and glassmorphism
    
    - Implemented dynamic 'Fly-In' animation for MapEditor (zoom 3 to zoom 5).
    - Increased map maxZoom to 20 for extreme detail inspection.
    - Applied semi-transparent glassmorphism (backdrop-blur) to Layers and Properties panels.
    - Overhauled Landing page globe behavior:
      - Initial 50% bottom visibility with deep distancing (altitude 5.0).
      - Smooth scroll animation focusing on Astana (altitude 0.05) with right-shift.
      - Automatic position and zoom reset on scroll back to top.
    - Added 'Administrative Boundary' feature class with dedicated styles and metadata fields.
    - Updated TypeScript types (ObjectType, LayerVisibility) to support new administrative features.
    - Fixed 'world edge' visual artifacts by matching MapContainer background to tile styles.

    - Add Go module vendor directories for auth-service and map-service

commit 5a7d5c85aa430aa57ebb6acc3bdde153533bd475
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Feb 27 13:13:26 2026 +0500

    feat: remove blur, polygon search area, text search by name
    
    UI changes:
    - Remove backdrop-blur from Toolbar and SearchResults panels
    - Search Area tool now draws Polygon by default, Rectangle only with Shift held
    - Add new TextSearch component: search objects by name with type filter,
      click result to zoom and highlight on map (5s auto-remove)
    
    Backend (map-service):
    - Add `search` query parameter to GET /api/map/objects endpoint
    - ILIKE search on name and description fields in GetAll and GetByBBox
    - Skip Redis cache when text search is active
    
    Frontend:
    - Add `search` parameter to apiService.getGeoObjects()
    - TextSearch component with debounced input (300ms), type filter dropdown,
      results list (up to 20), fitBounds + highlight on click
    - Prevent leaflet event propagation on search overlay
    
    Vendor:
    - Add Go module vendor directories for auth-service and map-service

commit df814c0d346f15b9c6640e24dbd33919543b5b09
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu Feb 26 20:17:22 2026 +0500

    feat: implement Manual Search Area tool, geometry clipping and LOD optimizations
    
    - Replaced automatic data loading with a manual 'Search Area' tool using arbitrary Polygon selection.
    - Implemented server-side geometry clipping (ST_Intersection) to reduce data transfer and browser memory usage.
    - Added Level of Detail (LOD) via ST_Simplify on the backend to optimize rendering at different zoom levels.
    - Fixed React Hook violation in PropertiesPanel.
    - Cleaned up repository by adding .gitignore and removing node_modules/dist from version control.
    - Restored missing river data (Esil) from original GeoPackage.
    - Added 'Clear Map' functionality and various UI/UX refinements.

commit 02dca6cada04093b4d28ae9d065d0ad12729b670
Author: AnuarSv <sultanbekov1706@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu Feb 26 20:17:22 2026 +0500

    feat: implement Manual Search Area tool, geometry clipping and LOD optimizations
    
    - Replaced automatic data loading with a manual 'Search Area' tool using arbitrary Polygon selection.
    - Implemented server-side geometry clipping (ST_Intersection) to reduce data transfer and browser memory usage.
    - Added Level of Detail (LOD) via ST_Simplify on the backend to optimize rendering at different zoom levels.
    - Fixed React Hook violation in PropertiesPanel.
    - Cleaned up repository by adding .gitignore and removing node_modules/dist from version control.
    - Restored missing river data (Esil) from original GeoPackage.
    - Added 'Clear Map' functionality and various UI/UX refinements.

    - Integrated edit and delete functionality for existing geo-objects directly from the map and sidebar.
    - Corrected Kazakhstan country boundaries using precise GeoJSON coordinates.
    - Optimized map UI by switching to light theme and removing default attribution controls.
